login.title: Log in
login.message: Log in to your account to access all the app's features

home.title: Manage your expenses, optimize your money, live stress-free.
home.subtitle: Organize, monitor, and optimize your finances easily. Enter your expenses, analyze your credit and debit card summaries, and keep a complete control of your financial situation, all in one place.
home.card1Description: Our app allows you to quickly register your credit and debit card expenses, with an intuitive design to help you view your balance and manage your finances with ease.
home.card2Description: With our interactive dashboard, you can view your expenses, balances, and savings in real-time, helping you make informed decisions to optimize your economy.
home.card3Title: We Take Your Data Security Very Seriously
home.card3Description: We will never ask for your card details and only handle basic information, ensuring your privacy at all times
